summary: Successfully tested Order Flow and Mira AI order recall functionality. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Order creation saves to database with orderId field, customer email, items, total, and status. Mira AI correctly recalls recent orders when asked about purchase history. Mira recommends birthday cakes and celebration items from the catalogue with allergy awareness. Service desk tickets (ticket_id) are created for cake orders.

login_flow.test_login_success: PASS - Returns access_token, user object with correct email

order_creation.test_create_order_with_all_fields: PASS - Order created with orderId, id, and ticket_id returned
order_creation.test_order_persisted_with_correct_fields: PASS - GET /api/orders/{id} returns order with customer.email, items, total, status, created_at
order_creation.test_get_my_orders: PASS - Returns orders for authenticated user

mira_order_recall.test_mira_recalls_recent_orders: PASS - Mira mentions orders/purchases including recently created items
mira_order_recall.test_mira_order_history_in_context: PASS - Mira shows order history context (Birthday Cake, Dog Food, etc.)

mira_celebration_recommendations.test_mira_recommends_birthday_items: PASS - Mira recommends cake, party items, bandana, photo when asked about birthday
mira_celebration_recommendations.test_mira_celebrate_context: PASS - Mira activates celebrate pillar for party planning

service_desk_integration.test_cake_order_creates_ticket: PASS - Cake orders return ticket_id (format: TCK-YYYY-NNNNNN)

verified_fixes.order_creation_orderId_field: VERIFIED - orderId field is correctly saved (lines 127 in orders_routes.py)
verified_fixes.mira_order_history_query: VERIFIED - Uses $or query for both user_email and customer.email (lines 12652-12658 in mira_routes.py)
verified_fixes.order_history_context_formatting: VERIFIED - Order items extracted and added to context (lines 847-860 in mira_soulful_brain.py)

database_info.orders_count_for_test_user: Multiple orders including new test orders created during testing

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Order creation correctly saves orderId field (line 127 in orders_routes.py)
✅ Mira order history query uses $or to check both user_email and customer.email (lines 12652-12658 in mira_routes.py)
✅ Order history is formatted into Mira's context as 'Recent purchases' (lines 847-860 in mira_soulful_brain.py)
✅ Service desk ticket auto-creation works for cake orders via on_order_placed callback
✅ Products are available in unified_products (321 products) and products_master (2197 products) for Mira recommendations
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test orders during testing to verify persistence and recall
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order flow and Mira AI order recall are fully verified. Test user dipali@clubconcierge.in has multiple orders in the database. Mira correctly loads order history using $or query for user_email and customer.email. Celebration products are available in products collection (mini-cakes, dognuts, etc.). Service desk tickets are auto-created for cake orders with format TCK-YYYY-NNNNNN.
